title: The Happy Years
actors: Dean Stockwell, Darryl Hickman, Scotty Beckett
plot: Based on a collection of stories with the focus on young John Humperdink "Dink" Stover, a student at the Lawrenceville Prepatory School, in 1896, whose family, in Eastcester, New York, have just about given up on his education bec...
